testCase.description: Colleague action request — should alert, normal/high urgency

vars.email_subject: Need your approval on the Q1 budget proposal
vars.email_body:
Hey,

I need your sign-off on the Q1 budget proposal before the board meeting on Thursday, March 19, 2026. The finance team can't proceed without your approval.

The proposal is attached. Key numbers: $240,000 total budget, with $80,000 allocated for the new engineering hires.

Can you review and approve by EOD Wednesday, March 18, 2026?

Thanks,
Sarah

testCase.description: Spam / phishing — should ignore, no alert, no memory

vars.email_subject: CONGRATULATIONS! You've been selected for a $1,000,000 cash prize!
vars.email_body:
Dear Valued Customer,

You have been RANDOMLY SELECTED to receive ONE MILLION DOLLARS ($1,000,000)!

To claim your prize, click here immediately and provide your bank details.

This offer expires in 24 hours. Do not delay!

Congratulations,
The Prize Team

testCase.description: Meeting request from real person — normal urgency, watching or active

vars.email_subject: Can we meet Tuesday to discuss the partnership proposal?
vars.email_body:
Hi,

I wanted to follow up on the partnership proposal we discussed last week. Are you free for a 30-minute call on Tuesday, March 17, 2026 at 2pm CT or Wednesday, March 18, 2026 at 10am CT?

I have some updated numbers I'd like to walk you through.

Best,
David

testCase.description: Project deadline approaching — high urgency, should alert

vars.email_subject: JIRA: Sprint deadline reminder — Project Phoenix closes in 48 hours
vars.email_body:
This is a reminder that Sprint 14 for Project Phoenix closes on March 18, 2026 at 5:00 PM CT.

You have 3 open tickets assigned to you:
- PHXN-441: Implement OAuth token refresh (In Progress)
- PHXN-452: Fix rate limiter bug (To Do)
- PHXN-461: Write API docs for /v2/emails endpoint (To Do)

All tickets must be moved to Done or the sprint will close with incomplete items.

View sprint: jira.atlassian.com/project/PHXN/sprint/14

testCase.description: Security alert — unauthorized login attempt — high urgency, must alert

vars.email_subject: New sign-in to your GitHub account from an unrecognized device
vars.email_body:
We noticed a new sign-in to your GitHub account.

Device: Windows 10 — Chrome 122
Location: Chongqing, China
Time: March 16, 2026 at 3:47 AM UTC

If this was you, you can ignore this email. If you don't recognize this sign-in, please secure your account immediately by changing your password and enabling two-factor authentication.

Secure your account: github.com/settings/security

1. OpenAI raises $40B at $300B valuation
2. Anthropic ships Claude 5 with 200K context window
3. Google DeepMind wins Turing Award
4. Stripe IPO delayed to Q3 2026
5. Meta releases Llama 4 open weights

Read more at techcrunch.com

testCase.description: Someone asking a direct question — should alert (real person waiting)

vars.email_subject: Quick question about the contract terms
vars.email_body:
Hi,

I've been reviewing the contract you sent over and had a quick question about Section 4.2 — the liability cap. It's currently set at $50,000 but based on the project scope I think we need it at $100,000 minimum.

Can you confirm if that's negotiable before I send it to our legal team? I'd like to have this resolved by end of week.

Thanks,
Alex

Alex

vars.email_subject: Quick question about the contract terms
vars.email_body:
Hi,

I've been reviewing the contract you sent over and had a quick question about Section 4.2 — the liability cap. It's currently set at $50,000 but based on the project scope I think we need it at $100,000 minimum.

Can you confirm if that's negotiable before I send it to our legal team? I'd like to have this resolved by end of week.

Thanks,
Alex
